name: feas_100
description: Coupled regression fixture: 30 facilities, 12 periods, 100 SKUs (1/3 two-level BOM with 3 recipe events each), binding shared lane capacities (13/lane/period) and shared labor (40/period). Reference: native HiGHS solves the flat twin (feas_100.mps) OPTIMAL, objective 4290, in 3.84 s. Pass bar: coupled engine returns optimal 4290 competitively.
